tools.name: Elicit
tools.one_liner: AI research assistant that automates paper discovery, data extraction, and literature synthesis across 138M+ papers and 545K clinical trials.
key_features: Search 138M+ papers and 545K clinical trials with natural language queries
Auto-extract structured data into comparison tables
Generate comprehensive research reports with sentence-level citations
Systematic review workflow: screen up to 5,000 papers automatically
Real-time research alerts for new publications
Chat with full-text papers and get AI-explained answers
tools.use_case: Ideal for conducting systematic reviews, building evidence matrices, and synthesizing findings across dozens of papers.
tools.how_to_use: 1. Enter a research question. 2. Review AI-ranked results. 3. Extract structured data. 4. Generate research report. 5. Export to reference manager.

pricing_details.Pro ($29/mo): Systematic review workflow, 12 reports/month, API access

tools.name: Consensus
tools.one_liner: AI-powered search engine that finds answers in scientific papers with evidence-based consensus scores.
key_features: Search 200M+ scientific papers with natural language
Consensus Meter shows agreement/disagreement across studies
Extract key findings, methods, and outcomes
Filter by study type (RCT, meta-analysis, etc.)
Save and organize papers in personal library
tools.use_case: Perfect for quick evidence-based answers to binary questions (e.g., 'Does X cause Y?') and understanding the weight of scientific consensus on a topic.
tools.how_to_use: 1. Ask a yes/no or comparative question. 2. View the Consensus Meter showing agreement distribution. 3. Read AI summary with citations. 4. Explore individual papers. 5. Save to library for later.

pricing_details.Basic (Free): Unlimited search, 5 Consensus answers/month, basic filters
pricing_details.Pro ($15/mo): Unlimited Consensus answers, advanced filters, citations export
pricing_details.Team (Custom): Collaborative workspace, API access, priority support
